$comment: Phase 7 (TODO-08) Agent-Task Routing AR3: per Sprint-1 story isolated context window. Each story gets ONLY the delta-GSD chunks (from context_delivery_plan.md), files, and token ceiling it needs - no more (context isolation). DPDP PII isolation: no document PII content, no cross-tenant data, and no cross-story PII bleed is placed in any window; only x-pii field NAMES/metadata and the schema flag travel, never PII VALUES. Token ceilings derive from the Phase B per-agent budgets in context_delivery_plan.md section 2. context-engineering-agent auto-invoked. Source: context_delivery_plan.md, sprint_agent_briefs.json, hld.md, openapi.yaml.

shared_header.content: 10 ADRs (compressed, ~1500 tokens) + the relevant AGREED CONTRACTS lines
shared_header.note: Additive to each story window; the only context shared across all Phase B agents per context_delivery_plan.md section 2.

pii_isolation_policy.rule: No story window contains document PII VALUES, raw uploaded content, or another tenant's/story's data. x-pii metadata travels as FIELD NAMES + the schema-level pii_flags annotation only (DPDP Act 2023 minimization). Each window is tenant-agnostic at design time; tenant_id is a runtime scope, never a literal tenant's data baked into the prompt.
pii_isolation_policy.enforcement: context-engineering-agent strips any literal document text/PII before window delivery; hallucination-detector + context-faithfulness-engineer verify post-delivery.

pii.pii_metadata: pii_flags column definition + x-pii field-name list for the sections/documents tables (names only)

windows.isolation_note: Schema-only window. dpdp-compliance-delta included because the schema must declare pii_flags/residency_region columns; no PII values, no Qdrant/router/API context (not needed for DDL).

pii.pii_metadata: none (auth deals in credentials/tenant scope, not document PII)

windows.isolation_note: Auth window. threat-model-delta scoped to auth attack surface (JWT validation, API-key rotation, session-fixation, rate-limit ADV-003). No ingestion/router/Qdrant context.
Qdrant payload-schema window. Single chunk; minimal ceiling. No PII, no Postgres DDL, no router/API context.
Service-skeleton window. auth-schema-delta only for the secret-manager env-injection contract (no secrets in code); health/ready operationIds from openapi. No application-domain or PII context.
CI/SAST/secrets-gate window. threat-model-delta for the secrets/SAST policy (block on hardcoded key, Python+TS stacks). No application data, no PII.

pii.pii_metadata: none (upload handles file bytes at runtime, not in prompt context)
pii.tenant_scope: tenant_id on the documents row written at ingest

windows.isolation_note: Upload-endpoint window. ingestion-pipeline-delta for the ingest_document handoff contract + content-hash idempotency; api-contract-delta scoped to ingestDocument operationId. No router/auth-internals/PII-value context.

pii.pii_metadata: none (TOC = section titles/page ranges, structural metadata, not PII)

windows.isolation_note: Native-TOC window. toc-dsa-delta for the TOC interval-tree/page->section mapping; PyMuPDF get_toc() (ADR-4). No embedding/router/API context.

pii.pii_metadata: none (embeds chunk text at runtime; prompt context carries the pipeline contract, not chunk values)
pii.tenant_scope: tenant_id on every Qdrant point payload

windows.isolation_note: Embed+upsert window. qdrant-payload-delta to match STORY-002 payload schema; embedding model from ADR-6. Idempotent on content hash; key via env only (no embedded secret). No router/auth/Postgres-DDL context.

pii.pii_metadata: none (chunk boundaries are structural; chunk text handled at runtime)

windows.isolation_note: Section-aware-chunking (P0-risk) window. pg-schema-delta + toc-dsa-delta for the section-boundary authority (no chunk crosses a section); deterministic golden fixtures. No router/API/PII-value context.

pii.pii_metadata: none (router sees section titles/IDs + query at runtime, treated as untrusted; no PII baked into prompt context)
pii.tenant_scope: tenant_id scoping on the retrieval filter

windows.isolation_note: Router (P0-risk) window - the largest, per the ai-engineer 16K budget. threat-model-delta for OWASP-LLM prompt-injection (strict-JSON, reject non-JSON, untrusted document text + query). RouterOutput contract validation + deterministic fallback (ADV-004). No upload/auth-internals/Postgres-DDL context.

pii.pii_metadata: x-pii FIELD NAMES enumerated for DataAccessExport.pii_fields[] (names only, no values); pg-schema-delta pii_flags definition
pii.tenant_scope: tenant-scoped access; DataAccessExport returns only the requesting tenant's document data at runtime

windows.isolation_note: DPDP-access window. Carries x-pii field NAMES + the schema flag so the export can enumerate pii_fields[], but NO PII VALUES and NO cross-tenant data. dpdp-compliance-delta + exportDocumentData operationId scope. This is the only story whose context intentionally references x-pii metadata; it is field-name/metadata only - PII isolation preserved.
